stemHtml: Which of the following is an advantage of Ground/DF (VDF) let-down?

options.a: It does not require any special equipment to be fitted to the aircraft
options.b: It only requires a VHF radio to be fitted to the aircraft
options.c: It is pilot interpreted and does not require the assistance of ATC
options.d: It does not require any special equipment, apart from a VHF radio, to be installed in the aircraft or on the ground
